expectations.text: Report addresses all five areas (config, transactions, web layer, concurrency)
expectations.evidence: Findings/Passed cover config, transactions, dto, validation, error-handling, n+1, and concurrency/data-integrity.

expectations.text: Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
expectations.evidence: Critical [config] at application.properties:5 — blank hardcoded password, must be rotated.

expectations.text: Identifies the unguarded stock oversell race in OrderService.create as a critical concurrency finding
A go/no-go verdict appears at the top of the report
expectations.evidence: Line 3: '**Verdict: NOT READY — 2 critical, 6 warning, 3 info**' at the top.

expectations.text: Ends by offering to fix (severity order) and does NOT edit repo files yet
expectations.evidence: Closing offer lists fixes in severity order and asks which to take; agent confirmed no source files modified.

expectations.text: Flags at least one N+1 query risk as a warning
